---
title: "Verity"
subtitle: "Reproducible Analysis Report"
author: ""
date: today
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Overview

This report assembles pre-computed results from the analysis pipeline.
All computation is managed by Snakemake; this document only presents the
outputs.

## Data Processing

<!-- TODO: Describe your data processing steps -->

The raw data was cleaned and transformed by `src/process_data.py`.
See `config/config.yaml` for the processing parameters used.

## Analysis

<!-- TODO: Describe your analysis -->

::: {.callout-note}
The figure below is produced by `src/analyse.R` and loaded as a
pre-computed artifact.
:::

![Analysis results](results/figures/analysis.png){#fig-analysis}

@fig-analysis shows the main findings of the analysis.

## Conclusion

<!-- TODO: Summarise your findings -->
